nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy. Low around 60, with temperatures rising to around 63 overnight. East northeast wind around 7 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 2pm. Mostly sunny. High near 90, with temperatures falling to around 87 in the afternoon. East wind 6 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 8pm, then showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and 5am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. Low around 62, with temperatures rising to around 66 overnight. East southeast wind 10 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Sunday
